releaseNotes: v0.24.22 — CRITICAL Android DB-open fix. v0.24.21 (and every release back to v0.24.17, latently) failed on Android at first launch with 'PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL' rejecting db.execute() because the pragma returns a row. Fix: call db.rawQuery() for that pragma (and wal_autocheckpoint). Escaped the Windows-only dev environment because sqflite_common_ffi tolerates the wrong API; Android sqflite_sqlcipher does not. Customer impact (Alex): locked out of the app on first launch of v0.24.21. No data loss — his ops were already synced before the update bit him. Also bundled: post-release smoke test (script + GitHub Action) that diffs sync-append KNOWN_OP_TYPES against the DB CHECK constraint, plus a second-opinion code review with 19 findings (17 non-bleeding, queued for v0.25.x).
